_purpose: Ground-truth character roster extracted DIRECTLY from the LOGH VII official manual (gin7manual.pdf). Verifies content/roster/characters.json.
_ground_truth_sources: gin7manual.pdf p14 — defines the 8 ability NAMES (統率/政治/運営/情報/指揮/機動/攻撃/防御) but NO per-character values
gin7manual.pdf p59-61 — 帝国 初期職務権限カード保持情報 (empire role/rank roster, vision-read)
gin7manual.pdf p65-66 — 同盟 初期職務権限カード保持情報 (alliance role/rank roster, vision-read)
_critical_finding: The LOGH VII manual contains ZERO numeric ability stat tables. Every 8-ability stat value in content/roster/characters.json is AI_INVENTED relative to the VII manual; values are actually transplanted from a DIFFERENT game (LOGH IV EX Korean save, content/roster/ivex-stats.json) with a self-admitted best-effort/uncertain column mapping. Even records labeled source="manual" (e.g. フリードリヒⅣ世) carry stats the manual does not contain.
_name_rank_verdict: Of 97 JSON characters, 70 match the manual roster by name; for those 70, rank_ja and faction match the manual EXACTLY (60 ranked + 10 politician/emperor). 27 JSON characters do NOT appear in the VII manual roster.
